# VaaniEval Community Support

GitHub Discussions is the best place to ask questions, compare evaluation
approaches, propose ideas, and share work built with VaaniEval.

## Where to post

| Need | Use |
| --- | --- |
| Setup, configuration, architecture, or usage help | [Q&A](https://github.com/shubhamofbce/vaanieval/discussions/categories/q-a) |
| Product or evaluation-workflow proposal | [Ideas](https://github.com/shubhamofbce/vaanieval/discussions/categories/ideas) |
| Open-ended community conversation | [General](https://github.com/shubhamofbce/vaanieval/discussions/categories/general) |
| A workflow, metric, integration, or project to share | [Show and tell](https://github.com/shubhamofbce/vaanieval/discussions/categories/show-and-tell) |
| Reproducible defect or scoped implementation task | [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/shubhamofbce/vaanieval/issues) |

Before posting, search existing discussions and review the
[development guide](../docs/development.md). Include the outcome you want, the relevant
VaaniEval area, your version or commit when applicable, and sanitized evidence
such as logs or examples.

Do not post API keys, credentials, personal information, customer names, or
private conversation data. Do not publicly disclose suspected security
vulnerabilities; use the repository's **Security** tab instead.

Community support is best effort. A clear, reproducible post makes it easier
for maintainers and other users to help.
